name: q
label: Search Query
help: Seed keyword to expand into autocomplete suggestions, e.g. skincare.

name: country
label: Country
help: Two-letter ISO country code that localizes suggestions to a market, e.g. US, GB, DE. Default US.

name: language
label: Language
help: Interface language for localized results, e.g. en-US or de-DE. Default en-US.

name: limit
label: Limit
help: Upper bound on suggestions to return (1-100, default 20). TikTok surfaces only a limited number of real autocomplete suggestions per keyword, so you'll often get fewer. Billed per result.

name: cache
label: Cache
help: Set true to serve from the 24h response cache. Default false — always fetch fresh data.
